titleStmt.title: SII 42.116: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 116. (A.R. No. B. 132 of 1954-55.) Ēlēśvaram, Devarakonda Taluk, Nalgonda District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a granite pillar set up in front of the Śiva temple on the bank of the Kṛishṇā.
Dated in Śaka 1167 Viśvāvasu, Paushya, ba. 15, Thursday, solar eclipse corresponding to A.D. 1246, January 24. The eclipse seems to have occurred on Friday.

Registers the gift of the royal share rāja-nālu (rāja-pālu) of one puṭṭi [of grain] from the income from lands irrigated by the tank called Kaṁḍidēvi-cheṟuvu for offerings in the temple at Ēlēśvaram. Kaṁḍidēvi is mentioned in No. 117 below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of Sun and crescent moon and a liṅga in between.

svasti śrī śubha śakava¨rṣamu
lu 1167 gunēṁṭi viśvāvasu
saṁvatsara pauṣya ba 15 gu
ruvāramunāṁḍu sū¨ryya
grahaṇakālamuna śrī yēlē
śvaradēvaraku svasti samasta rā
ja(jā)dhirāja divākaratēja parama
māhēśvara vīra lakṣmīśvara rāja
ratkā(tnā)kara rājapadmākara rāja
vanavasaṁtta rāja turaya(ga)rēva
ṁta rājaratnabhūṣaṇa rājamaṁ
tri bhūṣaṇa rājamaṇi maku
ṭa cūḍāmaṇi rājarakṣāma
ṇi nāmādi samasta praśasti sa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalē
śvara kākatīśvara gaṇapatidēva ma
hārājulu śrī yēlēśvaramu
naṁdula kaṁḍidēvi ceṟvu Eṟṟa
ṁjeṟvu mīṁda nitya puṭṭeṁṭi paḍi
rājanālu dēvara naivēdyamu
naku Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigā na
ḍapaṁgalavāru . bhūyāda
kāṁtarāyamakhi mahā
¨ryyaḥ siṁdūrarēṇu pari
bu ri ruṁbhari tā bhā
dātu madha su mērō
Digital edition of SII 42.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
